channel.title: Car Buying Tips on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Car Buying Tips on MinWeb

item.title: Yo-Yo Financing: What to Do If Your Car Loan Is Rejected
item.description: Imagine this: You walk into a dealership, spend hours negotiating, sign a stack of papers, and drive home in your new car. You make your first payment, settle into the routine, and finally start enjoying your purchase. Then, out of nowhere, the phone rings. The dealer claims there was a “funding issue,” your loan was rejected, and you need to come back to sign a “slightly different” contract—usually with a higher interest rate or a bigger down payment.
